CanYouGrab API
CanYouGrab API

Other endpoints

Endpointhttps://api.canyougrab.it

Bulk Domain Availability Check

POST
https://api.canyougrab.it
/api/check/bulk

Check availability of multiple domain names in a single request. Maximum 100 domains per request. Returns results synchronously.

Bulk Domain Availability Check › Request Body

domains
​string[] · maxItems: 100 · required

Array of domain names to check (max 100)

Bulk Domain Availability Check › Responses

Domain availability results

​object[]
POST/api/check/bulk
curl --request POST \ --url https://api.canyougrab.it/api/check/bulk \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data ' { "domains": [ "example.com", "startup.io", "myapp.dev" ] } '
shell
Example Request Body
{ "domains": [ "example.com", "startup.io", "myapp.dev" ] }
json
Example Responses
{ "results": [ { "domain": "example.com", "available": false, "tld": "com" }, { "domain": "startup.io", "available": true } ] }
json
application/json

List Supported TLDs

GET
https://api.canyougrab.it
/api/tlds

Returns all 800+ top-level domains supported by the API, with record counts and last-updated timestamps.

List Supported TLDs › Responses

Array of supported TLDs with metadata

No data returned
GET/api/tlds
curl --request GET \ --url https://api.canyougrab.it/api/tlds
shell
Example Responses
No example specified for this content type

Get Usage Summary

GET
https://api.canyougrab.it
/api/account/usage

Returns the current billing period usage summary for the authenticated API consumer, including lookups used and remaining quota.

Get Usage Summary › Responses

Usage summary for the authenticated consumer

No data returned
GET/api/account/usage
curl --request GET \ --url https://api.canyougrab.it/api/account/usage
shell
Example Responses
No example specified for this content type

Health Check

GET
https://api.canyougrab.it
/health

Returns API health status. No authentication required.

Health Check › Responses

200

API is healthy

No data returned
GET/health
curl --request GET \ --url https://api.canyougrab.it/health
shell
Example Responses
No example specified for this content type
